name: coding-agents
description: 対象 jobsite の Git root に .coding-agents 状態を置き、サブエージェント開発チームで intake / planning / execution / audit と DEBUG 根本原因ゲートを行う。

interface.shortDescription: Target-repo intake, agent-team execution, audit, and debug root-cause gating.
interface.longDescription: Resolves the jobsite or explicit --target-cwd repository, stores .coding-agents state under that target git root, and coordinates intake, planning, execution material, audit, and debug root-cause integrity through a parent agent and scoped specialist subagents.
defaultPrompt: Run Coding Agents intake for this target repo.
Plan this coding task with scoped subagents.
Normalize stale debugging integrity state for this target repo.
Debug this task with root cause, fix, and intended-outcome verification.
